Item.name: Shotgun Flechette Shot
Item.description: A shell loaded with small, finned steel darts. Improved armor penetration and a tighter spread pattern at the cost of raw stopping power.

Item.name: Depleted Flechette Shell
Item.description: A shell loaded with depleted uranium darts that pierce armor exceptionally well.

Item.name: Shotgun Target Shell
Item.description: A shorter-than-average shotgun shell, designed to be produced, transported and fired in bulk.Largely for sporting, pest control or target practice. Cheaper and smaller than full shells, but less effective.

Item.name: Shotgun Slug
Item.description: A shotgun shell, holding and firing a large solid lead slug as opposed to a spattering of shot. Capable of cracking through armor and laying out a lot of stopping power.

Item.name: Revolver +P+ Round
Item.description: A powerfully hot-loaded .38 revolver round, with a jacketed copper projectile lending toward improved armor penetration and a greater overall damage profile. It has a real nasty bite.

Item.name: Handcannon +P+ Round
Item.description: A exceedingly large .61 revolver round, though in a slightly longer case, loaded with a LOT more powder, and fielding a steel-cored copper-jacketed armor penetrating bullet. Designed for killing anything short of God, you could probably hunt Molochs with these rounds, though they're a touch innacurate due to their sheer power.

Item.name: .45 +P+ Magazine
Item.description: A limited-capacity .45 magazine, specially marked to indicate that it is loaded with high-pressure rounds. Highly damaging, but expensive and inaccurate by comparison to standard munitions.

Item.name: Extended .45 Magazine
Item.description: A high-capacity .45 magazine, traded largely only in restricted military-grade markets.

Item.name: Surplus Rifle Round
Item.description: A steel-jacketed, soft-point lead projectile rifle round, cheaper to produce in bulk than traditional polymer or brass rounds, but a little less effective and prone to innacuracy.

Item.name: Rifle +P+ Round
Item.description: A brass-cased, titanium-jacketed steel-cored rifle round capable of punching through all but the absolute thickest armor. Though powerful (and expensive), they actually do slightly less damage than a traditional FMJ round, due to the projectile's tendency to fail to expand upon hitting soft tissue.
